mission: PREREG_conf030.md single-shot: second and FINAL frozen-threshold attempt permitted by the detbench stop rule. One run at conf >= 0.30, both clips, no iteration regardless of outcome. VERIFIED=0; no proposal writing; no best_stack/code changes.
prereg_criteria: PASS requires: wolverine sw=0 AND spectFP=0 AND farFP=0, WHILE burlington all-clean with material gain (cov4 >= 0.95-class, IDF1 > baseline).

prereg_evaluation.consequence: Per prereg: FAIL -> coordinator's 2b executes (ship-for-demo flip proposal at the production-equivalent 0.18 operating point with the wolverine regression stated verbatim). This lane writes NO proposal.

interpretation: Raising the conf floor 0.18 -> 0.30 made wolverine WORSE on every axis (2 sw vs 1, 16 spectFP vs 4, cov4 0.677 vs 0.723, IDF1 0.778 vs 0.804): the wolverine spectator detections are high-confidence, so a conf floor cannot remove them, while the higher floor fragments genuine far-player tracks (more switches, less coverage). Burlington is insensitive (0.9234/0.9850 vs 0.9220/0.9933). Threshold-only fixes for the wolverine regression are now exhausted per the two-attempt stop rule.

inputs_identity.source: pinned detbench arm-1 RF-DETR-L raw detections (ckpt sha256 0f4e20e1..., person class id 1, native 704), NO re-inference
inputs_identity.pipeline: per-frame BOTSORT (botsort_no_reid_loose.yaml) -> frozen association (margin 1.0 + OSNet defaults) -> frozen scorer (IoU 0.5, expected 4, frozen GT)
inputs_identity.preflight: bundle 864963c7... / payload dc76b9a9... / 4 scorer+association md5s / OSNet sha256 prefix all MATCH two-sided; VM HEAD cabdb8cf

provisioning.gate: fresh fleet list 04:51:36Z -> Track G T4 RUNNING (untouched) + historical fleet1; no pre-existing conf030 VM
provisioning.vm: pickleball-gpu-conf030, A100-SXM4-80GB SPOT, ase1-c, pd-balanced 200GB from pickleball-fleet-snap-20260709-w7close

rail_proof: sudo shutdown -P +45 as FIRST ssh action, 04:56:09Z: 'Shutdown scheduled for Fri 2026-07-17 05:41:08 UTC'; /run/systemd/shutdown/scheduled MODE=poweroff (logs/lane.log).

teardown.instances_list_confirm: fleet filter -> only pickleball-t4-eventhead (Track G) + historical fleet1; name~conf030 -> 0 items

honest_issues: Same caveat as vm_rerun: the RF-DETR-L detector stage ran on the detbench H100 session (pinned raw dumps reused); only filter/track/associate/score ran on this A100.
The prereg PASS bar's 'cov4 >= 0.95-class' was evaluated as cov4 >= 0.95 exactly; burlington 0.985 clears it either way.
Both eval clips remain historical-internal; nothing here is promotion evidence; the fresh-clip full gate remains unmet (prereg states this too).
